title: Adds Execution Charter + 7-gate acceptance + RT-01A/B/02/03/04 tracker
public_claim: Adds Execution Charter + 7-gate acceptance + RT-01A/B/02/03/04 tracker is a preserved project packet for this is the RC1 lineage's "execution readiness" successor.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Adds Execution Charter + 7-gate acceptance + RT-01A/B/02/03/04 tracker, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
